items.definition_en: Math is the subject where you learn about numbers and calculations.
items.example_en: I have math class every morning.

items.definition_en: Science is the study of the natural world and how it works.
items.example_en: We do experiments in science class.

items.definition_en: History is the study of past events and people.
items.example_en: History is my favorite subject at school.

items.definition_en: Geography is the study of places, countries, and nature.
items.example_en: We learn about countries in geography.

items.definition_en: Art is the subject where you draw and paint.
items.example_en: We made paintings in art class.

items.definition_en: Music is the subject where you learn about songs and instruments.
items.example_en: She plays the guitar in music class.

items.definition_en: English is the subject where you read and write in English.
items.example_en: We practice speaking in English class.

items.definition_en: Biology is the study of living things like plants and animals.
items.example_en: We look at plants in biology.

items.definition_en: Chemistry is a subject where you learn about different substances and how they change.
items.example_en: We wear safety glasses in chemistry class.

items.definition_en: Physics is the study of matter, energy, and how they interact.
items.example_en: We talk about gravity in physics.

items.definition_en: Computer science is the subject where you learn about computers and programming.
items.example_en: We write simple programs in computer science.

items.definition_en: Literature is the subject where you read books, stories, and poems.
items.example_en: We read novels in literature class.

items.definition_en: Grammar is the study of how words and sentences are used.
items.example_en: We learn English grammar at school.

items.definition_en: French is the subject in which you learn the French language.
items.example_en: My sister studies French at school.

items.definition_en: PE is the subject where you do physical exercises and play sports.
items.example_en: We run races in PE class.

items.definition_en: Spelling is the way words are written using letters.
items.example_en: I practice spelling words every day.

items.definition_en: Reading is the activity of understanding written words.
items.example_en: We have reading time after lunch.

items.definition_en: Writing is the activity of making words and sentences on paper.
items.example_en: Good writing is important in school.

items.definition_en: Economics is the study of money, work, and business.
items.example_en: We learn about prices in economics class.

items.definition_en: Social studies is the subject where you learn about people and communities.
items.example_en: Social studies teaches us about different cultures.
